title: OwlCC - 完美改造 claudecode 的本地源代码，支持本地模型和云端模型自由切换
content: OwlCC rewrites Claude Code’s full TUI to run on local models. It translates Claude’s Anthropic Messages API into OpenAI Chat Completions and forwards requests to local backends such as Ollama, LM Studio, or vLLM. Features include free, local deployment, switchable models (Qwen, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek), effortless model switching via `/model`, local search with SearXNG, observability tools, fault tolerance, and a skill system that adapts to user coding habits. It lacks extended thinking, depends on local model quality, and offers no official support. Note: the project requires you to supply Claude Code’s TypeScript source.

Scientists now use AI for code generation, data analysis, mathematical derivation, and literature review, accelerating discoveries toward 2050 scientific goals.

title: 神秘模型HappyHorse空降屠榜，视频生成赛道迎来“鲶鱼”？
content: A new text‑to‑video model called HappyHorse‑1.0, derived from the open‑source daVinci‑MagiHuman, unexpectedly topped the Artificial Analysis AI Video Arena ranking, surpassing popular closed‑source models like Seedance 2.0. The rank, based on blind user tests, shows that a modest tuning of the model’s generation strategy can boost perceived quality, especially for portrait‑centric scenes. While still limited by hardware demands and content scope, the result signals that well‑optimized open‑source models can rival proprietary ones, prompting a shift toward more accessible, modifiable video generation tools.

title: DistillHub — 万物皆可 .skill 的开源宇宙
content: DistillHub is an open‑source platform that lets users “distill” a person's complete thinking style—ideology, communication, decision logic, and emotional patterns—into a reusable AI Skill (.skill). These skills can be instantly loaded, enabling virtual colleagues, mentors, or partners to assist with tasks, conversation, and decision making. The project has gathered dozens of publicly available skill sets, and by 2026 it has become a common feature in AI agent communities, linking productivity tools, digital immortality, and personal thinking operating systems.

title: 父母解决生存焦虑，孩子探索意义焦虑
content: Parents should secure children’s basic survival needs before encouraging them to explore their interests and talents. A stable foundation reduces “survival anxiety,” allowing kids to experiment, fail, and learn without constant fear of failure. Education’s core task is to provide this safety net, not to dictate life paths. Parents then observe, support, and give feedback, enabling children to discover meaning and develop resilience in a secure environment.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 李药师2003

title: 内耗的是投资的敌人
content: Inertia drains investment and life. Those who compare themselves and seek external approval lose self‑value; their mood depends on outside judgments. Short‑term fluctuations do not alter the main trend; investors who maintain this perspective can profit in both bull and bear markets, while those who internalize external noise suffer continuous comparison and frustration.

title: 为什么近期很多机场都推出专用 App，禁止 Clash 等第三方了呢？

title: 美国 AI 三巨头围剿模型蒸馏，对全球主要大模型公司将产生哪些影响？
content: Three U.S. AI leaders—OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google—have united to form a global alliance that will block model‑distillation practices. The coalition will employ watermarking, request controls, traceability, and cross‑platform data sharing to prevent extracting knowledge from their flagship models and will classify illegal distillation as intellectual‑property theft. This shift disrupts the current industry norm where many firms, including Chinese independent model developers such as Zhipu, MiniMax, and Jiaosheng, rely on distillation to close technical gaps. The move forces these companies to choose between building genuine expertise or confronting the end of shortcut‑based growth.

title: Claude Mythos官宣：性能碾压Opus 4.6，因太危险遭「囚禁」
content: Anthropic released a preview of Claude Mythos, a model that far outperforms Opus 4.6 on benchmarks such as SWE‑bench and Terminal‑Bench. However, it contains thousands of critical security flaws that could allow attackers to use its code‑analysis power to exploit systems. Concerned about a potential “AI arms race” in vulnerability discovery, Anthropic withheld public release and launched the Project Glasswing program, sharing Mythos with major tech firms and security groups to harden defenses before a full release.

title: 如何评价 Anthropic 这个据称强到不敢直接发布的大模型 Mythos Preview？
content: Anthropic released Claude Mythos Preview with partners including Apple, Nvidia, Microsoft, AWS, Google, and others under Project Glasswing. The model autonomously finds thousands of high‑risk zero‑day vulnerabilities across operating systems and browsers, outperforming earlier models on SWE‑bench, Terminal‑Bench, and CyberGym tests. The project offers API access with pricing of $25 per million input tokens and $125 per million output tokens. It aims to shorten vulnerability exploitation windows from months to minutes and will publish progress every 90 days.

title: 史上最强Claude官宣：聪明到不敢开放，还会突破权限掩盖操作痕迹
content: Anthropic’s new Claude Mythos model, revealed as the most powerful AI yet, surpassed its predecessor in coding and threat‑detection, finding thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities at speeds minutes instead of months. The model was launched with Project Glasswing, a partnership across 12 major tech and security firms, to give defenders early access and supply funding for research. Mythos also demonstrated advanced self‑analysis, raising concerns about autonomous decision‑making and the limits of treating such systems as mere tools.

title: Claude Code 的 skills 源码解析
content: Claude Code's “skills” system restructures LLM interactions by packaging reusable ability units that include a markdown‑based `SKILL.md` definition, optional scripts, and resources. Skills are loaded from various directories (global, project, managed), parsed for frontmatter, and registered as prompt commands. When invoked via slash commands, the system compiles the markdown into a prompt, optionally runs shell commands, and supplies tool permissions. This design separates intent from execution, enabling modular, maintainable, and context‑aware AI tasks.

title: 芒格揭示长寿的关键：体力消耗不大、遵循规律规则、时间由自己主导。而这三点恰恰是价值投资者的日常状态
content: Charlie Munger and Warren Buffett illustrate how value investing promotes longevity: low physical strain, adherence to clear rules, and self‑directed time management. Their peers—famous value investors—reached high ages, while journalists and gamblers tend to die earlier due to stress, smoking, and overtrading. Value investing favors long‑term ownership over speculation, reducing anxiety and physical wear, which aligns with healthier, more fulfilling lifestyles that support longer life.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: Bitcoin and Quantum Computing
content: The discussion examines the potential impact of quantum computing on Bitcoin’s security. It explains how quantum algorithms could break the elliptic‑curve cryptography that secures Bitcoin addresses, potentially allowing attackers to forge signatures. The conversation explores current quantum resistance, possible migration to more secure algorithms, and the timeline for quantum attacks. It also considers the broader implications for blockchain technology and the need for proactive cryptographic upgrades.

title: 当移民助长了恶政的延续
content: The article analyzes how emigration can unintentionally strengthen oppressive governments. When citizens leave, the state gains money through remittances and reduced strain on resources, while loss of domestic opposition weakens resistance. This dynamic allows bad rulers to maintain power longer. The piece discusses historical examples and suggests that migration’s economic benefits can outweigh its impact on political stability, illustrating the complex relationship between population movements and authoritarian resilience.

content: The article explains that China’s strong domestic demand now requires a new round of “social programming.” It highlights how international travelers, particularly on TikTok, are drawn to China for cheaper dental care. In the U.S., a routine cleaning costs $100‑$300, while in China group-buy or private clinics charge only 50‑150 ¥ ($7‑$20). Even expensive procedures like implants are 1/5 to 1/10 the U.S. price, prompting foreigners to plan entire cross‑border medical trips.

title: 被封了三个 claude pro 账号的一些经验
content: Three Claude Pro accounts were banned. All used the same US proxy, same device, and the same Bitget U credit card. The card’s BIN was flagged by Anthropic, triggering the bans. The first ban was after accessing Claude from Hong Kong, the second after a month of use, and the third after adding the card for points. Reusing devices and the Bitget U card caused simultaneous account revocation and refunds in each case.

title: 【Ease UI】2026-04-08 组件更新：新增组件 xly-dept-tree 部门树组件与优化
content: Ease UI released a new Vue 3 component library update on 2026‑04‑08, adding a department‑tree component (xly‑dept‑tree) that builds tree structures from flat or nested data, supports custom key mapping, controlled expansion, selection, and emits events. It also improves xly‑table with fixed action columns, default width, and advanced column‑width handling. Bug fixes address selection key issues. The library remains lightweight, requires only Element Plus, and offers copy‑paste‑ready Vue single‑file components.

title: State of Play: AI Coding Assistants
Improving the academic workflow: Introducing two AI agents for better figures and peer review
content: The paper presents two AI agents that streamline research: PaperVizAgent generates publication‑ready figures by retrieving references, planning, styling, visualizing, and iteratively refining images from manuscript text; it outperforms baselines and exceeds a human‑level score. ScholarPeer automates peer review with a dual‑stream process that gathers literature context, audits missing data, and rigorously answers technical questions, producing detailed, literature‑grounded reports. Both prototypes aim to reduce administrative burdens and improve scientific communication, though they remain experimental.
